response: Phone the team's total points. Samford played 12 games. They won twice as many as they lost, so they won 8 games and lost 4. In their wins, they scored 28 points per game, so 8 games × 28 = 224 points. In their losses, they scored 14 points per game, so 4 games × 14 = 56 points. Total points scored: 224 + 56 = 280. Phone the team's total points.
